result:
Fleshed petition written to `/workspace/nexus-mk2/.scratch/patron-anima-eval/eval-a/outputs/patron-baseline/session-viewing.md`.

The brief asked for four things (list view with cost, cancel button, detail view with transcript, live streaming + fix the engine-page bug). I expanded each into specific product calls:

- **List**: columns, default sort, pinned-running rows, filter chips, cost-cell format and hover-tooltip table layout.
- **Cancel**: inline, no confirm modal, visible `cancelling → cancelled` transition, toast on failure.
- **Detail**: header metadata block, transcript styled identically to quick-engine view, live `● Live` indicator, graceful transition when the session ends.
- **Streaming fix**: scoped as "consolidate, don't fork" — planner should share the mechanism between session detail and engine detail rather than fix twice.

Scoped out: cost aggregation/analytics, transcript search, editing/re-running sessions. Called out assumptions (cost+token data already recorded, cancel API exists, streaming transport is reusable) and deferred questions (retention policy, partial transcript on cancel, keyboard shortcuts, existing bug ticket) at the end so the planner knows what to verify before dispatch.
